name: Olminu
description: A young magician of the Octobrists. She was charged with watching Toyohisa's group of Drifters. She seems to be quite incompetent at reconnaissance, and is terrified of the Drifters she must follow. After she is discovered and kidnapped by Toyohisa's group, she tells them the story of the Drifters and Offscourings.

name: Ophelia
description: Ophelia is a diva AI active in small theaters around the world. Her mission as an AI is "to make everyone happy with songs" like Vivy. She's usually a bit shy and sloppy, but she performs the highlight on stage. (Source: Official Site, translated)

name: Rikka Sakuragawa
description: Rikka is [Kurou Sakuragawa](https://anilist.co/character/125947)'s older cousin and the reason he visited the hospital as regularly as he did. Just like Kuro, she also has the powers of immortality and precognition, although she wants them to be removed and has tried medical science and suicide to no avail. ~!Due to this, she later switches her plan on creating imaginary monsters such as Steel Lady Nanase with god-like powers, hoping that they would eventually be able to turn her back to normal.

name: Saki Miyanaga
description: __Height:__ 155 cm (5'1") __Position:__ Captain Saki Miyanaga is a first-year student at Kiyosumi High School in Nagano Prefecture and the title character of the manga "Saki". name: Sekkekkyuu AA2153
description: As a rookie, he was initially excited for his task of going to the lungs, only to find LDL's, Carbon Monoxide, and Pneumococcus along the way. He is dedicated to doing his part in helping the body, however is strongly disheartened by the awful work conditions and failure of the body to improve. (Source: cellsatwork.fandom.com)

name: Setsuna Kiryu
description: Kiryu Setsuna, also known as The Beautiful Beast, is a mysterious individual whose history is closely intertwined with Tokita Ohma's. He was the affiliated fighter for the Koyo Academy Group during the most recent Kengan Annihilation Tournament. Kiryu is an outwardly very polite and nice person, belying his true obsessive nature, which is entirely directed towards Tokita Ohma, with an irrational hatred towards Tokita Niko. name: Shuri
description: __Height__: 180cm The youngest son of the Emperor, he rules over Saikoku (western Japan) which includes Chugoku, Shikoku and Kyūshū. In the early parts of the story Shuri stands out as brutally cruel to those who do not obey him, because he is responsible for the destruction of Byakko Village and the murder of Tatara. name: Squall Leonhart
nativeName: スコール・レオンハート
description: In Final Fantasy VIII, Squall is a student at Balamb Garden, a prestigious military academy for elite mercenaries known as "SeeDs." As the game's story progresses, Squall becomes friends with Quistis Trepe, Zell Dincht, Selphie Tilmitt and Irvine Kinneas, and falls in love with Rinoa Heartilly. These relationships — combined with developments in the game's plot — gradually turn him from a loner to an open and caring person.

description: Washu Hakubi, the greatest scientific genius in the universe, is a key character in the Tenchi Muyo! metaseries. name: Yashiro Chikama
description: Chikama Yashiro is a friend of [Hino Akira](https://anilist.co/character/167926/Akira-Hino), who met while they were fishing. Like Hino, Chikama makes her own sound effects, the most notably being the "breathing" sound for her space suit. In her introduction, she explains that she has come to Earth to find her brethren. Chikama wears a full body spacesuit. It has childish design elements, such as hearts and star patches.
